message:
refactor: feature-gate SQLite integration tests and fix PRAGMA column inference

Moves sqlmodel-sqlite from a dev-dependency to an optional dependency
behind the new "c-sqlite-tests" feature flag. All SQLite integration
tests (joined inheritance, select_one semantics, introspector check
constraints) are now gated with #![cfg(feature = "c-sqlite-tests")].
This prevents CI failures on platforms where the bundled C SQLite
compilation is not available or desired, while keeping the tests
fully runnable via --features c-sqlite-tests.

Fixes PRAGMA quick_check column inference to return "quick_check"
instead of sharing the "integrity_check" column name, matching
real SQLite behavior. Adds a corresponding unit test.

Cargo.lock updated with io-uring, uring-fs, pollster, and bitflags
1.x additions from transitive dependency resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
